# BizTrack – Business Manager

> All-in-one web and mobile app to manage a business, factory, or rental property: sales, stock, purchases, expenses, orders, services, team, and receipts. Works offline-first with optional Premium tier.

BizTrack (also published as Business Manager and My Factory) supports three workspace types — retail/wholesale Business, Factory production, and FlexRent rental — with shared core features for inventory, finance, multi-tenant teams, and B2B discovery between businesses.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Sign-in, sign-up, and product hero.
- [Privacy Policy](/privacy): How user and business data is handled.
- [Browse Listings](/browse): Public discovery of rentals and listings.
- [Orders](/orders): B2B order placement, tracking, and disputes.

## Optional

- [Reset Password](/reset-password): Account recovery flow.
